description.ko: 흑요석 단일체가 날카로운 디지털 파편으로 붕괴되는 기하학적 형태.
description.en: A geometric collapse of an obsidian monolith into sharp digital fragments.

prompt: A digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Entropy Core.' A monolithic #1A1A1A obsidian cube undergoing a controlled geometric collapse, shattering into #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards within a #FFFFFF clinical void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast ray-traced reflections, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution.
